query: How does navigation between screens work?

results.name: 3400-SEND-SCREEN
results.preamble:
File: COACTUPC.cbl
Program: COACTUPC - Business logic - Accept and process ACCOUNT UPDATE
Paragraph: 3400-SEND-SCREEN (lines 3589-3602)
References: COPY CVCRD01Y, COPY CSLKPCDY, COPY DFHBMSCA, COPY DFHAID, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY COACTUP, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSMSG02Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVCUS01Y, COPY COCOM01Y, COPY CSSETATY, COPY CSUTLDPY
results.summary: paragraph 3400-SEND-SCREEN in COACTUPC.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCRD01Y, CSLKPCDY, DFHBMSCA, DFHAID....
results.content:
3400-SEND-SCREEN.

           MOVE LIT-THISMAPSET         TO CCARD-NEXT-MAPSET
           MOVE LIT-THISMAP            TO CCARD-NEXT-MAP

           EXEC CICS SEND MAP(CCARD-NEXT-MAP)
                          MAPSET(CCARD-NEXT-MAPSET)
                          FROM(CACTUPAO)
                          CURSOR
                          ERASE
                          FREEKB
                          RESP(WS-RESP-CD)
           END-EXEC
           .

References: COPY CVCRD01Y, COPY COCOM01Y, COPY DFHBMSCA, COPY DFHAID, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY COACTVW, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSMSG02Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVCUS01Y
results.summary: paragraph 1400-SEND-SCREEN, 1400-SEND-SCREEN-EXIT in COACTVWC.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCRD01Y, COCOM01Y, DFHBMSCA, DFHAID....
results.content:
1400-SEND-SCREEN.                                                        
                                                                                
           MOVE LIT-THISMAPSET         TO CCARD-NEXT-MAPSET                     
           MOVE LIT-THISMAP            TO CCARD-NEXT-MAP                        
           SET  CDEMO-PGM-REENTER TO TRUE                                       
                                                                                
           EXEC CICS SEND MAP(CCARD-NEXT-MAP)                                   
                          MAPSET(CCARD-NEXT-MAPSET)                             
                          FROM(CACTVWAO)                                        
                          CURSOR                                                
                          ERASE                                                 
                          FREEKB                                                
                          RESP(WS-RESP-CD)                                      
           END-EXEC                                                             
           .                                                                    
       1400-SEND-SCREEN-EXIT.                                                   
           EXIT                                                                 
           .

results.name: RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
results.preamble:
File: COUSR02C.cbl
Program: COUSR02C - CICS COBOL Program - Update a user in USRSEC file
Paragraph: RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN (lines 250-265)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COUSR02, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
results.summary: paragraph RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN in COUSR02C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COUSR02, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... comment hint: ----------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN.

           IF CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM = LOW-VALUES OR SPACES
               MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
           END-IF
           MOVE WS-TRANID    TO CDEMO-FROM-TRANID
           MOVE WS-PGMNAME   TO CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM
           MOVE ZEROS        TO CDEMO-PGM-CONTEXT
           EXEC CICS
               XCTL PROGRAM(CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM)
               COMMAREA(CARDDEMO-COMMAREA)
           END-EXEC.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
